---
title: "eslint.config.js"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/eslint.config.js"
loc: 36
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.82
style_score: 4.11
intel_score: 8.67
overall_score: 7.48
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.1/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 9 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://@eslint/js)
- [*](file://eslint-plugin-jsdoc)
- [*](file://typescript-eslint)

### Exports
- `tseslint`
